name: Whipped Butternut Squash (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Transfer the cubed butternut squash to a microwave-safe casserole dish.
2. Add the water and cover with a lid, then microwave on high for 10 to 12 minutes or until very tender.
3. Stir in the butter (or olive oil), milk, and Parmesan cheese. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Blend the mixture until smooth and creamy using a hand mixer.
